postReview.title: MLS: Playoffs settled after Decision Day drama
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake and FC Dallas snatched the final two playoff spots on offer in the Western Conference on Decision Day in MLS.

postReview.title: MLS: Playoffs definidos tras el drama del Decision Day
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake y FC Dallas se quedaron con los dos últimos puestos de playoff disponibles en la Conferencia Oeste en el Decision Day de la MLS.

postReview.title: MLS: I playoff decisi nel dramma del Decision Day
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake e FC Dallas hanno strappato gli ultimi due posti playoff disponibili nella Western Conference durante il Decision Day in MLS.

postReview.title: MLS: Playoffs definidos após drama no Dia de Decisão
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake e FC Dallas conquistaram as duas vagas finais nos playoffs da Conferência Oeste no Dia de Decisão da MLS.

postReview.title: MLS : Le suspense de la Decision Day fait place aux playoffs
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake et FC Dallas ont arraché les deux dernières places en playoffs disponibles dans la Conférence Ouest lors de la Decision Day en MLS.

postReview.title: MLS: Playoffs nach spannender Schlussrunde entschieden
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake und FC Dallas sicherten sich die letzten beiden Playoff-Plätze in der Western Conference am 'Decision Day' in der MLS.

postReview.title: الدوري الأمريكي: تحديد المتأهلين للأدوار الإقصائية بعد دراما اليوم الأخير
postReview.description: اقتنص فريقا ريال سالت ليك وإف سي دالاس آخر مركزين مؤهلين للأدوار الإقصائية في المؤتمر الغربي في الدوري الأمريكي لكرة القدم، بعد أحداث يوم التحديد.

postReview.title: MLS: Playoffs definidos após drama no Dia da Decisão
postReview.description: Real Salt Lake e FC Dallas garantiram as duas últimas vagas para os playoffs disponíveis na Conferência Oeste no Dia da Decisão na MLS.

preReview.title: St Louis City v Real Salt Lake: ‘We are on the right track’, says Burki
preReview.description: St Louis City will look to cause an upset on decision day as they host playoff hopefuls Real Salt Lake at Energizer Park.

preReview.title: St Louis City vs Real Salt Lake: 'Estamos en el camino correcto', dice Burki
preReview.description: St Louis City buscará dar la sorpresa en el día de decisión al recibir a los aspirantes a los playoffs, Real Salt Lake, en el Energizer Park.

preReview.title: St Louis City x Real Salt Lake: 'Estamos no caminho certo', diz Burki
preReview.description: O St Louis City buscará causar uma surpresa no dia decisivo ao receber o Real Salt Lake, que está na briga pelos playoffs, no Energizer Park.

preReview.title: St Louis City v Real Salt Lake: ‘Siamo sulla strada giusta’, afferma Burki
preReview.description: St Louis City cercherà di sorprendere nell'ultima giornata ospitando i pretendenti ai playoff Real Salt Lake all'Energizer Park.

preReview.title: St Louis City v Real Salt Lake : 'Nous sommes sur la bonne voie', déclare Burki
preReview.description: St Louis City cherchera à créer la surprise lors de la dernière journée en accueillant les prétendants aux playoffs, Real Salt Lake, à l'Energizer Park.

preReview.title: St. Louis City gegen Real Salt Lake: 'Wir sind auf dem richtigen Weg', sagt Bürki
preReview.description: St. Louis City möchte am Entscheidungstag für eine Überraschung sorgen, wenn sie die Playoff-Anwärter Real Salt Lake im Energizer Park empfangen.

preReview.title: سانت لويس سيتي ضد ريال سولت ليك: 'نحن على الطريق الصحيح'، يقول بروكي
preReview.description: سيحاول سانت لويس سيتي تحقيق المفاجأة في يوم الحسم حين يستضيفون ريال سولت ليك الطامح للتأهل إلى البلاي أوف في حديقة إنرجايزر.

preReview.title: St Louis City v Real Salt Lake: ‘Estamos no caminho certo’, diz Burki
preReview.description: O St Louis City buscará surpreender no dia de decisão ao receber o Real Salt Lake, que sonha com os playoffs, no Energizer Park.

QAData.answer: St. Louis City vs Real Salt Lake on Sun, 19 Oct 2025 01:00:00 GMT ended in a 2–2 tie.
